name: Charcoal Gradient Cinematic Product Reveal Landing
description: A cinematic dark product reveal page with keynote-presentation scroll pacing — each viewport-height section holds exactly one idea. The hero is a thin light-weight sans headline in off-white floating over a charcoal-to-black radial gradient void. Scroll reveals a 3-panel product mockup (narrow sidebar navigation + main stats dashboard + agent detail panel) inside a window frame with traffic-light red/yellow/green title-bar dots and a subtle 1px border. Below, numbered editorial value blocks (01 / 02 / 03 in large faded monospace numerals) each pair a single sentence with a supporting detail panel. The entire page is a choreographed vertical unveiling — no lateral movement, no grid, just one thing after another emerging from darkness.

vibes.mood: Feels like the lights dimming at an Apple keynote right before the 'one more thing' — the radial gradient is the darkness of a stage, each scroll-stop is a slide transition, and the traffic-light dots on the mockup window are the only signal that this is software and not a film title sequence.
influences: apple product launch page scroll choreography
teenage engineering product photography on black
nothing phone launch page reveal pacing

meta.audience: Product leaders and technical buyers who expect the marketing page to demonstrate the same production quality as the product — people who notice that the mockup has three panels and the scroll has intentional pacing
